donate.title: Xhasa i-AISBF
donate.thank_you: Enkosi ngokuqwalasela ukupha. Inkxaso yakho inceda ukugcina i-AISBF njenge-software evulekileyo simahla.

welcome.title: Wamkelekile kwi-AISBF!
welcome.early_adopter: Enkosi ngokuba umsebenzisi wokuqala! Sikwifazini yophuhliso olukhulu.
welcome.feedback: Impendulo yakho isinceda ukuphucula i-AISBF. Ungayi nkxalabi ukuqhagamshelana nathi!

contact.title: Qhagamshelana nathi
contact.question: Umbuzo
contact.message_placeholder: Chaza ingxaki okanye isicelo sakho ngokuthe vetshe...
contact.success: Umyalezo uthunywe ngempumelelo! Enkosi ngempendulo yakho.

providers.credentials_file_desc: Indlela apho iziqu ze-OAuth2 ziya kugcinwa khona
providers.upload_credentials_desc: Layisha ifayile JSON yeziqu ze-Claude OAuth2
providers.provider_key_label: Provider Key (isivalo esizodibaniseka ngetshixo esinjalo, umz. "gemini", "openai", "kiro")
providers.provider_key_hint: Loo nto izakusetyenziswa njenge-ID yomnikezeli kubalwalo naseziphethweni ze-API
providers.kiro_auth_hint: Khetha indlela yokuvikeleka: Iziqu ze-Kiro IDE (creds_file), igolide lwe-kiro-cli database (sqlite_db), noma iziqu ezilungekile (refresh_token + client_id/secret).
providers.kiro_aws_region_hint: Indawo ye-AWS yenye i-Kiro API (okumgaqoqo: us-east-1)
providers.kiro_refresh_hint: Isitshixo sokuphinda seku-Kiro sokuqinisekisa ngokuthe ngekudibanise
providers.kiro_client_id_hint: Isandi somsebenzisi we-OAuth2 we-AWS SSO OIDC yokuvikeleka
providers.kiro_client_secret_hint: Isitshixo esinyukayo somsebenzisi we-OAuth2 we-AWS SSO OIDC yokuvikeleka
providers.kiro_upload_creds_hint: Layisha ifayela yeziq ze-Kiro IDE JSON
providers.kiro_upload_sqlite_hint: Layisha ifayela legolide lesixhobo sokuqhinga lwe-kiro-cli
providers.kilo_auth_hint: Khetha indlela yakho yokuvikeleka: I-API Key (ikhethwa kakhulu ngokulula) noma i-OAuth2 Device Authorization Grant.
providers.subscription_based_hint: Ukuba ikhangele, lo mnikezeli ungamalungu wokuqhubeka noqwalaso luzokuboniswa njenge-0. Ukusetyenziswa kwasa kugcinwa ngokwengqiqileyo.
providers.price_prompt_hint: Shiya lidelele ukusebenzisa intlawulo ebuyileyo. Imizekelo: OpenAI GPT-4: 0, Anthropic Claude: 5, Google Gemini: .25
providers.price_completion_hint: Shiya lidelele ukusebenzisa intlawulo ebuyileyo. Imizekelo: OpenAI GPT-4: 0, Anthropic Claude: 5, Google Gemini: .00
providers.default_rate_limit_tph_hint: Umvuzo wesivinini wombala womhla ngemihlaka kumhlinzeki
providers.default_rate_limit_tpd_hint: Umvuzo wesivinini wombala womhla kumahlombe emehlweni kumhlinzeki
providers.default_condense_method: Indlela Yokunciphisa Ommandla (conversational, semantic, hierarchical, algorithmic)
providers.native_caching_hint: Imisebenzi yokugcina okwengqiqileyo kwemveliso (i-Anthropic cache_control, i-Google Context Caching, i-OpenAI kanye nezinhlelo zokusebenza ze-API ezilingana ne-Kilo) ukwehlisa imali.
providers.enable_native_caching_hint: Nika amandla ukugcina okwevelaphi kumahlombe (50-70% yokonga imali) kumhlinzeki esekunikezelayo
providers.cache_ttl_hint: Ukuphila kokugcinwa kwe-cache kwiisekhondi (kubalulekile kuphela kwe-Google Context Caching)
providers.prompt_cache_key_hint: Isandi esikhethekileyo lokulungisa indlela yokuhamba kwe-load-balancer ye-OpenAI/Kilo
providers.models_section_hint: Qwalasela imimodeli ethile kumhlinzeki, okanye shiya ingenanto ukuze kufunyanwe yonke imimodeli etholakalayo kumqondo womnikezeli omhle.
providers.model_filter_hint: Xa akukho mimodeli echazwe ngesandla, bonisa imimodeli eyodibanise nale mqondo kuphela (ukulinganiseka okungakhethekanga kwamaziko).
providers.auth_valid: ✅ Ukuqinisekisa kwe-{provider} kuyasebenza. Kuphelela emva kuka-{expiry}
providers.auth_success: ✓ Ukuqinisekisa kwe-{provider} kwelele ngempumelelo! Iziqu zigcinwe.
providers.auth_timeout: ✗ Isikhathi sekuvikeleka liphelile. Nceda zama futhi.
providers.auth_expired: ✗ Isikhathi sekuvikeleka liyaphela. Nceda zama futhi.

rotations.notify_errors_desc: buyisela iimpazamo njengomyalezo xa bonke abanikezeli behluleka
rotations.leave_empty: Shiya imodeli ingenanto ukusebenzisa zonke ezivela kumnikezeli
rotations.key_different: Isandi esitsha kufuneka ibe hlukile kumthombo.

autoselect.classify_nsfw_desc: Tsiba isicwangciso classify_nsfw esijoliswe kumhlaba wonke
autoselect.classify_privacy_desc: Tsiba isicwangciso classify_privacy esijoliswe kumhlaba wonke
autoselect.classify_semantic_desc: Tsiba isicwangciso classify_semantic esijoliswe kumhlaba wonke
autoselect.default_condense_context_desc: Qalisa ukunciphisa umxholo kweli nani leetoken
autoselect.model_description_hint: Yiba nzulu ngokuba le modeli isetyenziswe nini
autoselect.copy_prompt: Kopija "{key}" — faka isandi sesikhethi sokuzenzekelayo esitsha:
autoselect.key_different: Isandi esitsha kufuneka ibe hlukile kumthombo.

rate_limits.no_data: Akukho mida yesivinini esebenzayo. Idatha iya kubonakala xa abanikezeli befumana iimpendulo ze-429.

wallet_page.title: Wallet
wallet_page.no_card: Auto top-up charges your saved credit card automatically. You don't have a credit card on file yet.
wallet_page.auto_topup_desc: Enable auto top-up to automatically reload your wallet when the balance drops below a threshold.
wallet_page.no_payment_methods: No payment methods are currently enabled.
wallet_page.contact_admin: Please contact the administrator to enable a payment gateway.
wallet_page.wallet_upgrade_hint: You can use your wallet balance to subscribe to a paid plan and unlock higher limits.
wallet_page.invalid_amount: Nceda khetha okanye phayipha umkhawulo phakathi kuka-{min} no-{max}.

rate_limits_page.title: Rate Limits
rate_limits_page.desc: Adaptive rate limiting — learns from 429 responses
rate_limits_page.reset_all_confirm: Setha kwakhona zonke izilayini zangokwehla? Lokhu kuzocima zonke imida zangokwehla zikhona zakho.
rate_limits_page.reset_all_success: Zonke izilayini zangokwehla zisethwa kwakhona ngempumelelo

signup_page.title: Yenza iakhawunti
signup_page.username_hint: Imizuzu 3-50, amagama, amaninzi, imigaqi, amaqhochwane, nanombumba kuphela
signup_page.email_hint: Uzothola umyalezo wokuqinisekisa kweli kheli le-imeyili.
signup_page.password_hint: Okungenamizuzu eyitolela 8 ngamagama amakhulu, amancinci, nanombamba

forgot_page.title: Setha igama lokugqitha
forgot_page.intro: Faka idilesi ye-imeyili yakho kwaye siza kukuthumela isixhobo sokusetha kabusha igama lakho lokugqitha.
forgot_page.sent: Ukuba kukhona i-akhawunti enalo ikheli le-imeyili, sithumile isixhobo sokusetha kabusha. Isixhobo siziphela kwe-24 amahora. Nceda uhlole ibhokisi lakho le-imeyili kwaye ifayela lesiphuzi.

reset_page.title: Igama lokugqitha elitsha
reset_page.intro: Nceda phayipha igama lakho elitsha elitsha apha ngepha.
reset_page.success: Igama lakho lokugqitha lisethwe ngempumelelo. Ungakwazi ukungena ngalo ngoku.
reset_page.invalid_token: Eli nto yokuvikeleka lokusetha kwakhona iphasiwedi liyasele noma liyaphela. Nceda zama ukuthola eli nto yokuvikeleka lokusetha kwakhona.
reset_page.request_new: Cela Eli Nto Yokuvikeleka Lokusetha Kwakhona

profile_page.title: Hlela iprofayile
profile_page.subtitle: Hlaziya ulwazi lweakhawunti
profile_page.display_name_hint: Ingalandelanga ujongwa ngale ndawu kumhlaba wonke wenkonzo yakho
profile_page.upload_hint: Umlimango 5 MB. I-JPG, I-PNG, I-GIF, I-WebP.
profile_page.danger_zone_desc: Phela i-akhawunti yakho wonke nomxhaso wakho womxhaso uzocinywa ngokupheleleyo.
profile_page.upload_too_large: Umfanekiso mkhulu kakhulu. Umlimango wezinto ngokupheleleyo uyi-5 MB.
profile_page.upload_invalid_type: Ulayisho olungasebenzanga. Nceda layisha i-JPG, I-PNG, I-GIF okanye I-WebP.

email_page.title: Change Email Address
email_page.subtitle: Update your email address. You will need to verify the new email before it takes effect.

delete_page.title: Delete Account
delete_page.warning: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
delete_page.danger_zone_desc: Lesi senzo asikwazi kubuyiselwa. Wonke umnxeba wakho uzocinywa ngokupheleleyo.
delete_page.item_rotations: Zonke izicwangciso zakho zezijikelezi nezokukhetha ngokuzenzekela
delete_page.item_history: Onke umxhaso wakho wezicwangciso nezihlalo zezinto ezwenzeko
delete_page.sub_warning_desc: Unesitifikiso esiphathelayo esisebenzayo ({tier}). Ukucima i-akhawunti yakho kuzo:
delete_page.sub_item_access: Uya kuyonqibala ukufikelela kumalungu aphezulu wonke
delete_page.sub_consider: Cela ulondele kubeqala ukukhupha isitifikiso sakho ngempumelelo ngexesha elideleleyo xa ufuna ukuyisebenzisa.
delete_page.type_delete_confirm: Nceda bhala ngokuchanekileyo "DELETE" ukuze uqinisekise ukucima i-akhawunti.
delete_page.final_confirm: Uqinisile kakhulu? Lesi senzo asikwazi kubuyiselwa wonke umnxeba wakho uzocinywa ngokupheleleyo.

tokens_page.title: API Tokens
tokens_page.desc: Generate tokens to authenticate requests to your personal API endpoints.
tokens_page.no_tokens_hint: Create one to start using the API.
tokens_page.copy_now_warn: Kopisha le sithelo ngoku — azobonakala kwakhona.
tokens_page.delete_confirm: Susa lesi sithelo se-API? Lokhu kuzoshesha ngoko futhi asikwazi kubuyiselwa.

billing_page.title: Billing
billing_page.wallet_desc: Zonke izitifikiso zendawo zikhokela kusikhwama sakho kuqala.
billing_page.no_payment_methods_desc: Yongeza ikhadi lekhredithi ukuze unikwe amandla ukuqhubeka ngokuzenzakalelayo kwisitifikiso.

user_overview.subtitle: Manage your AI configurations, track usage, and access your personal API endpoints.
user_overview.higher_plans: {n} iindlela ezikhulu nezingaphezulu — imicelo engaphezulu, abanikezeli abaningi,
user_overview.auth_header_desc: Faka isitshixo sakho kwi-hayi {header} yonke isicelo:
user_overview.admin_access_desc: Njengomphathi unokufikelela izicwangciso zomhlaba ngamandla amafutshane ngezifomu zamamodeli:
user_overview.token_required: Isitshixo sakho siyadingeka kubo zonke imigudu.

usage_page.title: Usage & Quotas
usage_page.no_token_cap: Akukho umda womhola weetoken kweli ndawo
usage_page.upgrade_desc: Khupha indawo yakho ukuze uvule imicelo eyinengi, abanikezeli abaninzi, nezokukhetha ngokuzenzekela.

prompts_page.title: Izikhokelo zenkqubo
prompts_page.content_hint: Hlela itempleti yomkhokelo. Sebenzisa ukwenza ngokwencoko kwakho.
prompts_page.reset_confirm: Uqinisile ukuba ufuna ukusetha kwakhona le mpendulo kumisombululo we-admin osemthethweni?

tiers_page.title: Ulawulo lwezinga leakhawunti
tiers_page.subtitle: Configure account tiers, pricing, and usage limits for your users

subscription_page.title: Ulawulo Lwesitifikiso
subscription_page.billing_payments_desc: Lawula izindlela zokukhokha bese ubona umlando wezinokohla
subscription_page.no_payment_methods_desc: Yongeza indlela yokukhokha ukuze uhlele indawo yakho ngokwesivumelwano kwaye lozi phathane nemida yokusebenza.
